entry.title: Re: Do I need to map new SD Routes also in EWM in an embe...

entry.title: Configuring RE Accrual engine
entry.content:
I am configuring the RE accrual engine and have a few questions.

First, I’ll give some info about the requirement:

 

- Client will create Lease-in, service and insurance contracts

- Payments for more than one period are made in advance (deferrals)

- Lease-in contracts are valuated according to IFRS (main ledger) and German GAAP (non-leading ledger).

 

I have done all the customizing steps of consulting note 829676 and tested two contracts.

 

  • First contract - valuation relevant:

 1. TRCOCN stand for contract accrual and TRCORO for the object (in this case the cost center). Why does the system create two accrual objects in this case? It doesn’t seem correct to me since the payment of 20000 € is recognized twice.

I tried to deactivate the postings to accrual type TRCORO, but the accrual run doesn’t work by doing so.

Could someone explain if this is a correct behavior, and if yes, why is the object posting important?

 

 2. Although the contract is valuated as per IFRS, accruals are posted only to HGB (non-leading ledger). As per note 2441863 it is the correct behavior, since German GAAP is the Acct. Principle assigned to the transfer posting valuation rule:

That would mean that the no accrual objects are created for IFRS-valuated contracts.

Which effects does this have from an accounting perspective? Is there any way to extend this postings to IFRS as well?

  • Second contract – non-valuation relevant

3. Accrual run post accrual object to IFRS, which seems correct to me. I can observe that the Accrual transaction U is used instead of I. Could you give me feedback on this posting behavior as well? Are transactions C and F also necessary for deferrals?

 

In general, the client wants to post deferrals to both accounting principles. I suppose that is only possible using an BadI, right?

I’d also appreciate if you could give me some explanation on why accrual engine needs a start account and target account (that may differ from each other). There is SAP document with some accrual/deferral examples, but they are way much different than the posting results I achieved with the contracts above.

 

Thank you very much.

 

Regards

Thaís

entry.title: ABAP RAP - How to refresh the list of childrens after an root action has created a new child
entry.content:
I have a root-child data model (User-\_ChangeRequest), where childrens can be created through an action from the object page of the root entity.

I tried many scenarios already, but in no one of these the list of child nodes gets reloaded, after the action has created a new child:

action with result [1] $self

 

 

define behavior for Z_R_User alias User
{
...
  action ( features:instance ) createChangeRequest result [1] $self;
...
}

 

 

Filling the result parameter from the action

 

 

READ ENTITIES OF Z_R_User IN LOCAL MODE
     ENTITY User
     ALL FIELDS
     WITH VALUE #( FOR mapped_request IN mapped-changerequest
                 ( %tky = CORRESPONDING #( mapped_request-%tky ) ) )
     RESULT DATA(update_result).

result = VALUE #( FOR user IN update_result
                  ( %tky   = CORRESPONDING #( user-%tky )
                    %param = user ) ).

 

 

 action with result [1] entity Z_R_ChangeRequest

 

 

define behavior for Z_R_User alias User
{
...
  action ( features : instance ) createChangeRequest result [1] entity Z_R_ChangeRequest;
...
}

 

 

 Filling the result parameter from the action

 

 

READ ENTITIES OF Z_R_User IN LOCAL MODE         
     ENTITY ChangeRequest                                    
     ALL FIELDS                                              
     WITH VALUE #( FOR mapped_request IN mapped-changerequest
                   ( %tky = mapped_request-%tky ) )          
     RESULT DATA(update_result).                             
                                                             
result = VALUE #( FOR request IN update_result               
                  ( %tky   = CORRESPONDING #( request-%tky ) 
                    %param = request ) ).

 

 

 

factory action 

 

 

define behavior for Z_R_User alias User
{
...
  factory action ( features : instance ) createChangeRequest [1];
...
}

 

 

 I had to fill the table user in the changing parameter mapped manually, because if not the following error appears:

 

 

 

LOOP AT mapped-changerequest INTO DATA(request).                 
  mapped-user = VALUE #( BASE mapped-user                        
                         ( %tky = CORRESPONDING #( request-%tky )
                           %cid = request-%cid ) ).              
ENDLOOP.

 

 

But as mentioned before, no scenario get the child list updated after the action.

The function "side effects" has the option, that a entity will be reloaded after an action, but the feature is not available on our on-premise 2022 S/4HANA system:

action: Whenever the action is executed on the UI, the side effect is triggered and the defined targets are reloaded.

side effects { action MyAction affects Targets }

https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/side-effects#types-of-side-effects

Has anyone a suggestion how to achive this behavior?

entry.title: Guideline values not updated even after we change it
entry.content:
Hi All,


We have guideline setup in variable Pay template. After we launched default values are populating in the field. However when we change the value to some other value and save. It is not getting saved and default value is appearing again. What could be the reason here.

PFB example.
Guideline min-default-max -> 10-20-30
after launch Guideline is updated as 20 in worksheet. When manager is changing it to 25 and save, it is again defaulting to 20 again. 

Guideline optimization is selected, Force Default On Rating Change is NO, Force Default On Custom Field Change is NO.

Regards

entry.content: Hi @ShaneLipke

entry.title: Re: Enable Now video generated but audio is missing

entry.title: Re: February Developer Challenge - CAP Plugins: Week 1
Re: Closed DO Item with Invoice Number Query
entry.content: SELECT T0."DocDate", T0.DocEntry, T0.[DocNum] 'DO No', T0.[CardCode], T0.[CardName], T1.[VisOrder] + 1 'LineNo.', T1.[ItemCode], T1.[Dscription], T1.[Quantity], T1.[OpenQty], T2.Telephone as 'Sales Employee', T1.[TargetType], T1.[TrgetEntry], T4.DocNum FROM ODLN T0 INNER JOIN DLN1 T1 ON T0.[DocEntry] = T1.[DocEntry] INNER JOIN OSLP T2 ON T0.[SlpCode] = T2.[SlpCode] LEFT OUTER JOIN INV1 T3 on T1.[TargetType]=T3.[TrgetEntry] LEFT OUTER JOIN OINV T4 ON T4.[DocEntry] = T1.[TrgetEntry] WHERE T0."DocStatus" = 'C'

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP - How to refresh the list of childrens after...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

the list should be refreshed when you hand over the right object after it was created. You should look deeper into your ABAP coding.

 

Another way to achieve refresh (which I would recommend only if you come from the frontend - so you have triggered some special logic on the frontend side and you want to refresh it):

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/api/sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectPage.extensionAPI.ExtensionAPI%23methods/refresh

 

You could implement such a breakout coding by using the refresh method on the extensionAPI.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

entry.title: Re: Closed DO Item with Invoice Number Query
entry.content: I managed to modify my Query and get the result

entry.title: Re: Cannnot copy journal entry in Manange journal entry.
entry.content:
Hi,

 

there are several limitations to it, some are certain fields others are already mentioned in this question thread:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/how-to-copy-an-existing-journal-entry/qaq-p/12486560

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

Depending on your application you could also test it using the browser only and see what happens. If it works within the browser standalone but not inside sap business client - come back to me. 

Regards, 

Sandra

entry.content:

await remote.send('POST', 'service.entity/namespace.action', {parameters)

I am very open to further approaches/ideas.

entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am New SLT how can we Suppress leading zeros in SLT  replication? we have sources system S/4 Hana in-built SLT. Target SAP HANA on cloud, we see in these fields when data is being written to ACDOCA table in SAP HANA on cloud. We have master table field length 15 actual value 12345 but when SLT replication form source to target we sseeing additional zero add before the actual value of 000012345 is any way to fix this issue.

entry.title: Re: How to use ROUND( ) function to a nested case statement
entry.content: 1) Is it ABAP, ABAP CDS or HANA CDS? 2) There are two questions in one, frst one: why it's multiplied by 10 (NO REASON, CHECK YOUR DATA AGAIN), second one: why it's not rounded. You should use CAST to type correctly your result.

entry.title: Re: I created an advanced excel file with abap ole object...

entry.title: Mass completion of PO Confirmation control order Acknowledgment
entry.content: Hi all, I would like to complete the Confirmation Control of a PO with a click of a button. This takes too much time for MRP orders with 50 lines. Is there a faster way to fill in the Confirmation Control? Right now I need to change the Confirmation control to 0001, CC to AB, Delivery date and quantity for each line. I saw a video from somebody who could Display Confirmations with IW47, but I can't find that for Fiori. I just want to confirm that the delivery date and quantity is confirmed just as the PO. I think this should be possible with the press of a button... Can somebody help me with this? It would save me a lot of time. We just migrated to S4 HANA Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: SAP Content Server with cloud connector
entry.content:
> but i don't know which hostname /ip that will be used 

You need to connect to the "virtual hostname" as defined in the SCC. When using a standard HTTP client (like Apache), you need to provide the host/port of the cloud-side Connectivity Agent as a "Proxy". (See Consuming the Connectivity Service | SAP Help Portal for some sample code on how to do this.)

The alternative is to use the Destination Service, which then handles all the connection-related technical details automatically.

> Also does we need a physical public IP address for the onpremise content server to be connected using sap cc?

No. This is the whole point of the SCC: no public IPs need to be exposed to the Internet! (You can even use "mickey-mouse" as your virtual hostname, and the connection will still work... 🙂 )

entry.title: EWM SAP EWM configuration of the storage type for bulk storage
entry.content:
Hello colleagues,

I have a problem with the configuration of a block storage type. Different articles with different quantities are to be stored on HU in the storage type.
Either entire HUs are to be removed from storage or picking from HUs is also to take place.
I have set it up as I understand it, but I get this error message. How do I solve the problem?

And I also ask whether I have set it up correctly overall.

What else needs to be set apart from the bearing type?

Thank you for your support

entry.title: Re: SUBMIT
entry.content:
The error seems to be triggered in a custom program (zj3rflvmobvedh)

  • Can you execute this report from its transaction or SA38/SE38 and perform The Conistency Check (ALV Grid)  - Often, print and export of data are less tolerant than simple display for many errors.
  • Also you didn't check if some data was returned (if the z-program raise an error message in selection-screen and don't call ALV when no record selected)

 

CHECK <lt_pay_data> IS ASSIGNED.

 

  • You could (testing) also set display = abap_true to insure that the z-report actually  displays some data with those parameters

entry.title: Re: Maximize Your Learning Success with Live Sessions
entry.content:
Hi @mick99 , thank you for your question. Do you have an active SAP Learning Hub license? If not, this might be the reason for the error message.

Best regards, Conny

entry.title: BTP destination not appearing in BAS storyboard
entry.content:
I am following this course: Develop Full-Stack Applications Using Productivity Tools in SAP Business Application Studio  and have encountered a problem. The course material is a bit out date with the referenced Cloud systems (also the internal walkthrough playbacks don't match the course screens) , but I have been able to follow it up until the point that it uses live data.

In Course Unit 2, from BAS I have logged into the accelerator hub and obtained service details, which have correctly transferred into a service definition.   

In another section following this, I have to create a destination in BTP cockpit to the same hub.

The connection check gives

I'm not sure if 404 is the correct response but it suggests the server is at least responding. I can also get a feed response from the Hub API "Try Out" feature of the Business Partner API that the service is modelled on, so it would appear that a correctly formed API request would work.

I have a problem with the built Fiori Elements application. The lesson starts off using sample data, which works. I am then prompted to build a 'live data' configuration and this is where things fail. The screen below shows the 'apihub_sandbox' destination being populated in the course article, but in my case it is empty, no default, do dropdown.

It is not explained how this destination is supposed to recognised in BAS or if there is a step missing. I have been back and forth and cannot find any missing steps. I have looked at notes on the property WebIDEUsage and it doesn't list it being used in this way, i.e. I don't know if 'apihub_sandbox' is a new standard value that has a certain use or if it is just an identifying tag value. 

I have the required administrator role in BAS. I have triple-checked the destination properties, but it just doesn't work. 

Can anyone provide any guidance?

Could you be maybe a little bit more specific about the object?

Many thanks and best regards,
Christian

entry.title: In SAP SSFF Compensation, how to remove column groups?
entry.content: In SAP SuccessFactors Compensation, when I delete entire columns and sections (column groups), upon re-entering the sheet, it appears as though I haven’t deleted the groups (the individual columns are gone, but the groupings persist). Consequently, if I make any changes to the template, I encounter an error stating that the groupings are empty and prevent ME from saving. How can this issue be resolved?

entry.title: Re: WBS WIP calculation postings in FI
entry.content:
Hello Kanan, give a try to below 

create new RA version & RA key do all the related connfiguration, then in OKG8 (posting rule setting) give specific accounting principle tagged to non-leading ledger only for RA version. Also pay attention to record number column try giving first 0 then 2.

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: SAP BTP Ask Me Anything Series: SAP Build Code
entry.content:
Coming up next on the SAP BTP Ask Me Anything series: SAP Build Code. Get ready to have your questions answered live by our experts on March 27th – get all details about the session in this blog post. 

SAP Build Code was announced at SAP TechEd 2023 as THE game-changer for SAP developers. Why? Because it provides them with a seamlessly integrated environment for coding, testing, and application lifecycle management. And all that with generative AI-based code development with Joule copilot, based on natural language descriptions, and optimized for Java and JavaScript.  

What's it all about?  

With SAP Build Code, you get guided experiences and prebuilt templates to quickly build applications and extend your SAP systems - watch the teaser demo. It combines the most essential services from SAP BTP and delivers a cohesive experience for developers and fusion development teams:

Fusion development is all about breaking silos between teams and empowering business and IT to collaborate successfully – and this is what combining SAP Build Code and the low-code tools in SAP Build, can help you achieve. You can learn more about how SAP Build and SAP Build Code work together in this blog post: Comprehensive Tools for Novice to Expert Developers. 

Why should I join? 

SAP Build Code is now on preview and will be generally available in March 2024!! 

This upcoming AMA is the best option for you to learn everything you need to know about the solution, including how to get access and what’s next. And, of course, you’ll have your questions answered by experts in the topic: Tim Back, Chief Development Architect for SAP BTP Application Development, Automation and Integration, Rupa Maity is a Senior Product Manager and Yuval Anafi the Lead Product Owner for SAP Build Code. 

📆 Join on March 27 – 3 pm CET – LIVE on YouTube: 

If you already have related questions, drop them in the comments below. We’ll bring them to the session, so our experts can answer them LIVE. 

See you there! 

All the best, 
Maiara  

Learn more about SAP BTP and SAP Build Code: 

SAP Build Code | Community Topic Page 

SAP BTP | Community Topic Page 

SAP BTP Innobytes: bite-sized monthly video series, sharing the latest hits and top SAP BTP innovations. 

What’s New with SAP BTP: quarterly LIVE series for SAP BTP innovation highlights, with demos and time for Q&A 

SAP BTP Garage: monthly LIVE webinar with hands-on use case walkthroughs and demos 

SAP BTP Talk: monthly podcast covering all things SAP BTP

entry.title: Re: Fixed Assets with Zero NBV not posting depreciation a...
entry.content:
Hello Paul, Once NBV of asset is Zero what amount you are expecting as planned monthy depreciation. Do you want to post depreciation below NBV ? If yes it seems same need to enabled in depreciation area & key 

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Uncertainty and Volatility in B2B Procurement
entry.content:
In this complex network of industrious aspects such as manufacturing, sales, and distribution, procurement often remains under-emphasized, even though it is an essential part of business operations.

This fundamental element is significant in various sectors, including manufacturing, retail, construction, and healthcare. For businesses to thrive, it's vital to grasp a solid understanding of the multifaceted nature of procurement.

One of the most captivating aspects of procurement lies in how uncertainty and volatility play defining roles in its mechanisms. While procurement occurs in a market defined by its unpredictability, it's not completely random. It unveils a range of remarkable opportunities and concrete risks. For both buyers and suppliers, comprehending how these dimensions can impact their operations is vital to their survival and could potentially deliver a competitive edge.

External and internal factors

The factors contributing to uncertainty and volatility in procurement are multilayered. Interestingly, these aspects are constantly evolving, influenced by several external and internal elements. For example, the decisions of one buyer could significantly reverberate throughout the supply chain, setting off an unexpected chain of reactions.

Or, a sudden external shock like a pandemic, natural disaster, or geopolitical upheaval could rapidly pivot the landscape.

Internally, the capabilities of buyers and suppliers could evolve over time, molded by their experiences, resource investments, and advancements in their processes. Thus, market participants must not only understand the nature and origins of uncertainty and volatility in procurement but also formulate suitable strategies and tools to skillfully manage risks or harness potential opportunities.

Demand uncertainty and supply uncertainty

Classifying uncertainty in procurement primarily splits it into two categories: demand uncertainty and supply uncertainty. Both types can significantly impact the performance and actions of buyers and suppliers, though in different ways.

Demand uncertainty influences procurement in several ways. It can pose challenges to demand forecasting, complicate inventory management, and lead to poor ordering behaviors. On the other hand, supply uncertainty can make the supplier selection process daunting, complexify contract design, and affect supplier relationship management.

Interestingly, the impact of uncertainty and volatility is not a one-way street; procurement, in turn, may also impact these elements. Just as procurement strategies can bolster demand forecasting and enhance inventory management, choosing reliable and diversified suppliers can help mitigate supply issues. Therefore, an optimized procurement strategy can add value and not just reduce uncertainty and volatility.

While dealing with uncertainty and volatility may initially appear intimidating, it can also be an avenue for growth and advantage. By employing appropriate strategies and leveraging the right tools, buyers and suppliers can effectively manipulate market uncertainties and turn them into invaluable opportunities.

Keep in mind

To navigate the unpredictable and volatile procurement landscape, a few important aspects should be kept in mind. Thoroughly examining the sources and types of uncertainty, leveraging digital innovations, and fostering a cooperative supplier relationship is crucial. It is equally significant to be cautious about the use of outdated or erroneous data, maintaining a balance in the procurement strategy, and handling the supplier relationship correctly.

Buyers and suppliers who wish to navigate the uncertain and volatile procurement landscape successfully must regularly check the sources and types of uncertainty in procurement, create a flexible procurement strategy that adapts to changing market situations, leverage technology to expedite and optimize procurement, and maintain a healthy supplier relationship.

It is worth mentioning that businesses must anticipate and avoid common pitfalls that could negatively impact efficiency and satisfaction levels. In conclusion, uncertainty and volatility form an integral part of every procurement process, but with the right strategies, buyers and suppliers can effectively handle these elements and leverage them to their advantage. The success lies in astute planning, adaptability, technological leverage, and a harmonious relationship.

The technical solution

SAP and SAP Ariba Procurement  are technological solutions that help businesses navigate through uncertainties and volatility in procurement processes. They offer tools for better forecasting, supplier selection, contract design, and supplier relationship management, turning these challenges into opportunities for growth and competitive advantage.

entry.title: Re: To implement CICD Pipeine for Fiori Projects
entry.content:
Hi @NIKITHA

Thanks for reaching out me.

This morning the issue is resolved. 2 things i did

1. Cloud connector added GitHub

2. in the personal access token i have added the test project i am using now

after doing these now the build process is successful

entry.title: Maintenance Plan migration from ECC to S/4
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have requirement to migrate the existing maintenance plans from ECC to S/4. These maintenance plans have existing orders also generated. Business wants to move all the maintenance plan along with its generated orders into S/4.

If we migrate the plans, then what approach should be taken for deciding on the start date of the plan, also what approach should be taken to migrate the preventive maintenance order.

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Re: How to get Total in advance formulas
entry.content:
@Vasu_Sac 

In SAC All data is at every dimension level. Its just that you use # for some dimension to reduce the granularity.

Forecast ratio is not MatGroup level, it is MatLine Level. // Is it at MG level # ? Please show your second table with MG on rows along with ML.

And Sales_Forecast also should calculate at MatLine level. // Its getting calculated at ML level only.

Post the model view of this 2 data with all dimensions shown. Its difficult to help when you provide incomplete information. In your second table you should show MG also ( even if its #)

Nikhil

entry.title: Pricing in V2 how to integrate with ERP and or upload price records in mass
entry.content:
Hi,

According the documentation, currently SAP Sales Cloud V2 only knows a internal pricing set up. Where you configure all pricing elements in line with SAP S4 Hana.

I have 2 questions with regards to this pricing set up in V2 especially where it concerns the master date (prices, discounts etc.)

1. How can i upload price conditions in mass in V2 as the price conditions are not included in the export import tool

2. In a SAP learning on prices i find the following remark : If integrated with SAP S/4HANA, SAP Sales Cloud provides an add-on for SAP ERP for pricing integrations. You would have to configure the integration, cloud connector, and replicate the pricing master data.. Does any body knows the exact name of this add on, where it can be found and if it is included in the SAP Sales Cloud V2 licence.

Many thanks in advance.

Kr.

MJ

entry.title: Re: Performance Tips: Getting the most out of your Web Intelligence Processing Servers
entry.content:
@Matthew_Shaw 

Below are CPU usages from a very busy environment. There are multiple (hundreds) users, reports (thousands) and activities (view/refresh/export etc).

This is individual WIPS CPU from its metrics (2 WIPS on the same node):

first WIPS:

second WIPS:

This is overall CPU on the node with 16 cores:

so looks like 2 WIPS on a 16 core node are using as much CPU as they can??

entry.title: AXIS Adapter - Edit Log Configuration Locations
entry.content:
I am following the SAP Note 1039369 FAQ XI Axis Adapter.

Q: Which components are relevant for generating a debug trace output?

I am looking to be able to trace WSS4J in an Axis scenario with XML signature. The FAQ document explains that I need to add entries to the log-configuration.xml in the Axis SDA.

However, I don't know where is that file located. I have tried placing the example file provided in the FAQ in the META-INF folder of the com.sap.aii.af.axisproviderlib.sda and redeploy it to PI, but that doens't seem to work.

Besides, the Trace Locations in the NWA seems broken:

That <unknownclass> entry is very weird but I don't really know if it was there before.

I am not able to find any proper explanation about the XML file and how to add those entries.

Hi Rajesh,

Ragavie

I am hoping someone can help me.

I need to run a standard report that shows me all the PO's that do not have the versions indicator ticked and that have not had the PO printed.

 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Is SAP and Sustainability a Myth ?
entry.content: yes

entry.title: where I can find the list of BDCQ ?
entry.content:
I'm looking for thr full list of BDCQ existing for S4 HANA Public cloud migration. 

I do not find them when I go on Roadmp viewer.

Can anyone could send  the link to them ?

thanks

entry.title: Re: CICD Release failed
Re: Streams in RAP : Uploading PDF , Excel and Other Files in RAP Application
entry.content:
Hi, Siddhartha,

 

What is your progress in using SDM ?

As I know, if we store the uploaded file in database like Hana, there will be size limit for the uploaded file . That is why we need to use BTP SDM to store the uploaded file .  But if we use SDM, the file selector is not in RAP like function GUI_UPLOAD  in classic abap . So we have to use function in Behavior , but function can only be used as read only and we can not save sdm file object ID in instance . Do you have any idea to handle this ?

 

Best regards!

 

Jacky Liu

entry.title: Re: To implement CICD Pipeine for Fiori Projects
entry.content:
1. Cloud connector added GitHub

2. in the personal access token i have added the test project i am using now

after doing these steps now the build process is successful

entry.title: How is BIREQU_***** job getting triggered
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement where in we need to stop sending data to SAP BW from SAP ECC system. I think the data is going because of this job that starts with BIREQU_ . But I dont know how the job is getting created. Everyday the variant is different and name last part is different. 

Could you please help me in knowing how to stop this job from getting created. How to stop data flow to SAP BW.

entry.title: Hello everyone! How can i migrate my data In S4/HANA on premise, from "T" system to "P"?
Re: CICD for SAP On-Premise and UI5 applications
entry.content:
Hi Joseph,

Thanks for the detailed description.

Can you please help me which SAP documentation you are referring to implement Fiori --> ABAP OnPremise Pipeline using BAS, GitHub and CICD services

 

Regards,

Ragavie

entry.title: Connect CPI-PI to CI-DS via BTP client ID & secret
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Is there any way to use BTP client secret & ID in CPI-DS datastore as user Id & password to connect another cloud platform (i.e. CPI-PI) which is already a part of BTP integration suite via subaccount?

Currently we are connecting to CPI-PI (SOAP webservices) via technical user in a SOAP type datastore in DS, and business wants to evaluate if there is any option to connect CI-DS & CPI-PI webservices via BTP using client secret & ID to replace the use of technical users in CI-DS datastore.

Please suggest.

 

Note - The reason to connect CI-DS with CPI-PI is that there are multiple 3rd party system which is connected via API and the endpoint of the same is exposed to CI-DS via CPI-PI as SOAP services.

3rd party API -> CPI-PI (SOAP webservice) -> CI-DS SOAP datastore via technical user (Current architecture) 

Thanks,

Ratan

entry.title: Expert-guided Live Sessions: The perfect complement to digital learning
entry.content:
The new SAP Learning Site gives you 24/7 access to free digital learning content that you can use specifically, accessible, and individually for your education and training in the SAP area.

In addition, the corresponding SAP Learning Hub subscription (for customers, for partners) – at a significantly reduced price since January – gives you free access to training systems, 4 certification trials, and a variety of expert-guided live sessions.

Benefit from the many years of experience of our subject matter experts, engage with other live session participants, and extend your digital learning experience with expert support.

The already very comprehensive live session offer will be continuously expanded, the first dates for the 2nd Quarters are now released:

Live Sessions

Choose the right offer from our live session types:

  • Expert Deep Dive Live Sessions to expand and deepen your knowledge
  • What’s New Live Sessions to familiarize yourself with the new features of a product update (releases)
  • Get Started Live Sessions to get a quick, expert-supported entry point to a digital learning journey
  • Stay Certified Live Sessions to prepare specifically for the questions of the re-certification assessment (as of April) 

Benefit from personal exchange with other participants and experts and register today.

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Melbourne March 2024
entry.content:
Brought to you by SAP Community members, the SAP Stammtisch is an informal meetup everyone can participate: SAP users, developers, consultants and architects - come and join us and bring a friend.

Read the blog post by @BenPatterson and get more information! Don't forget to join the Melbourne Group to connect with other local members.

entry.title: Re: How to get info about my SPA process via API
entry.content:
Hi @Dan_Wroblewski 

DO you happen to get answer for this. Like is there a way we can figure out if the action was accepted or rejected through the user task API's?

Regards,

Karthika

entry.title: auto suggest in abap editor is too small
entry.content:
I have SAP logon 740 in LENOVO YOGA X1.

The auto completion/suggestion in ABAP editor is too small and too dense.

I tried to change windows resolusion but ity didn't fix it. I also tried to play with the logon options but nothing works.

Anybody knows how to fix it?

entry.title: Re: About Using Text to Speech Feature in SAP Enable Now
entry.content:
Hello Kristina and Shane, Thank you for your quick responses. 

I also googled a little and got an answer suggesting to verify your enable now license, which includes the capability to play audio files. Some versions or configs may have limitations on audio playback. We looked at the SAP Enable Now license for some other client, and found that the audio issue is not there? 

Do you have any thought on this? Can this be a license issue?

Thanks.

entry.title: [HANA CLOUD] How to back up a schema from PRD and import it to QAS
entry.content:
Currently, I am learning and researching about BTP and Hana Cloud for my next project.

I have few questions:

1. Imaging that I have created Hana DB in BTP and split it into Dev 20GB, QAS 30GB and PRD 50GB. Every 6 months, I need to copy some Schema / Table Data from PRD to QAS to make sure our QAS can use the up to date data for training and developing. Which tools or Technique should I use for this situation?
I am thinking I can do it such as S4 On-premise by using some LSMW tools, program or take DB Snapshot for this situation but I can't find out any information about it.

2. After running many years, the data in PRD will become bigger and it needs to be archived. How can I compress all the data need to be archived and Where should I store it? 
I am thinking about using Data lake but not really sure about it.

Please help.

entry.title: Re: sap hana certification
entry.content:
Please access our Certification Transformation site 
There you find the link to the SSAP Certification Recommendation document 
In this document you can find the recommendation for recertification

C_HANAIMP SAP Certified Application Associate – SAP HANA 2.0 is planned to be retired on 2024-03-28
C_HANAIMP will be renamed to C_HAMOD.
No re-certification required for those already certified in C_HANAIMP.

Certification C_HAMOD will also cover topics currently part of C_HCMOD.
Therefore, C_HCMOD will be retired.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: February Developer Challenge - CAP Plugins: Week 3
Custom Field from Object Position to Succession Org Chart
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I hope that you are doing well. 
I need your expertise to enable custom field of Object-Position to Succession Org Chart.
All 15 custom fields have been used in Employee Profile. Kindly assist on how to map custom field from Position to Succession Org Chart.

 

Thanks and Regards,
Rishabh Gupta

entry.title: Will the Latest Version of My Forms Page for Performance Management be mandatory in the future?
entry.content:
Hello,

When enabling the option "LATEST VERSION OF MY FORMS PAGE FOR PERFORMANCE MANAGEMENT" there are features enabled that are not required and therefore the option is now disabled for some companies. Will the Latest Version of My Forms Page for Performance Management be mandatory in the future?

 

Thank you

entry.title: S/4HANA cloud extensibility service on BTP - not available?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm struggling a little bit. I'm working on an event mesh implementation from S4Public Cloud. I'm trying to connect a BTP environment to receive events. But here is the case:

- I already linked my S4HPC environment to the BTP using the Tokens. The system is registered in BTP

My main goal now is to activate the entitlements to use the cloud extensibility. Somehow I'm not able to assign those.

so unless I have not assigned this to  a subaccount, I'm not able to generate communication arrangements and actually create the link to the system. (item 7)

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/enable-events-from-s-4hana-cloud-to-event-mesh/ba-p/13559401

 

Any ideas? I do have all roles in BTP and S4HPC and the cpea credits are there.

All the best

Laurens

entry.title: Re: Adaptation Project Generator for VS Code - Adaptation...
entry.content: That didn't work because the "/test-resources/sap/ushell/bootstrap/sandbox.js" could not be loaded, I guess because the test-resources are not available when downloading SAPui5 from https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/#sapui5.

entry.title: Re: Adaptation Project Generator for VS Code - Adaptation...
entry.content: I found out that if I add the proxy configuration in my .npmrc file, the loading of the UI5 resources works fine, but I will get the error I described before (error 503). If I delete the proxy, I can connect to the SAP system, but cannot load the UI5 resources via ui5.sap.com. Are there maybe some options for the fiori-tools-preview adp target entry to connect to the SAP system? I could not find any documentation about this option.

entry.title: Custom fields in WebDynpro app for Equipment master data
entry.content:
Hi,

We need two Custom Fields in the Equipment master data – one for Activity Types and one for Work Packages (Work Packages are basically WBS Elements used in from Customer Projects). We did follow the standard process for Custom Fields, but when we wanted to make these fields checked against existing values (Activity Types and Work Packages), we couldn’t do it.

Here are more details:

When creating a Custom Field for Work Package, we are calling it using a CDS View for the Work Packages:

This field seems to work as expected in the app for Technical Objects, for example:

However, when the Work Package Custom Field is added to the Account Assignment View in the Equipment master data using the WebDynpro procedure, it is not behaving the same way as in the above applications.

This could be due to a WebDynpro Limitation.

This field in the Equipment master data is too short and when we click on the pulldown icon it doesn’t show any values.

Do we encounter the issue because of the WebDynpro limitations? Or are we missing something here?

Please, advise.

Thank you and regards,

Ludo Bebjak, Syntax

entry.title: How to enter item that is used for promo
entry.content:
Hello. I have a client that wants to setup items that are promo items without cost in SAP Business One. 

How do i go about inputting the items and their prices and the deadline for the promo.

Hope to get a response.

entry.title: How to create a mass upload for a custom apps in S4HANA Public Cloud.
entry.content:
We have a request where in we need to have a mass upload to one of our custom apps. 

May I know how we can create it?

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps composer pro feature requests
entry.content:
So I manually turned off camera and images for the preview app, and I could not pick images. But when I manually turned on images for the app I still could not pick images. Only when I granted camera permission to the app was it able to pick images.

What you're describing here is exactly the bug that needs to be addressed, the image picking functionality (in the flow function) is wrongfully associating itself with use of the camera instead of actual image library permissions.

The dialog for asking permissions usually only appears at the first time the app tries to request a certain permission. If you deny it then, you'll need to go through Settings app to enable it.

entry.title: Re: Approval Documents being added successfully without t...
entry.content: Thanks for your response. But i want to know how to customize it.

entry.title: Re: NF-e Technical Note 2023.004 v1.1: New Fields Added to Nota Fiscal
entry.content: SAP Notes for SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, outbound and inbound invoicing options for Brazil and SAP Electronic Invoicing for Brazil (SAP Nota Fiscal Eletrônica) are planning to be released by the end of March.

entry.title: Asset does not exist
entry.content:
Hi guys,

I would like to read out the activation data of an assest from transaction AS02 in Powershell, but unfortunately the scripts tells me that the asset does not exist, but when I use it in SAP GUI I find the asset.

 

 

 

[Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFile("C:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\assembly\GAC_64\sapnco\v4.0_3.1.0.42__50436dca5c7f7d23\sapnco.dll") > $Null
[Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFile("C:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\assembly\GAC_64\sapnco_utils\v4.0_3.1.0.42__50436dca5c7f7d23\sapnco_utils.dll") > $Null

Function Get-Destination {

      #-Connect paramters-----------------------------------------------
        
        $cfgParams = New-Object SAP.Middleware.Connector.RfcConfigParameters

        #---TEST---
        $cfgParams.Add("NAME", "SAP")
        $cfgParams.Add("ASHOST", "xx.xx.xxx.xx")

        $cfgParams.Add("SYSNR", "00")
        $cfgParams.Add("CLIENT", "100")

        $cfgParams.Add("USER", "user")
        $cfgParams.Add("PASSWD", "password")

      Return [SAP.Middleware.Connector.RfcDestinationManager]::GetDestination($cfgParams)

    }

  #-Sub Invoke-SAPFunctionModule----------------------------------------
 $destination = Get-Destination

[SAP.Middleware.Connector.IRfcFunction]$bapiChangeAsset = $destination.Repository.CreateFunction("BAPI_FIXEDASSET_GETDETAIL")

$bapiChangeAsset.SetValue("COMPANYCODE", "0001")
$bapiChangeAsset.SetValue("ASSET", "31745")

$bapiChangeAsset.Invoke($destination)

[SAP.Middleware.Connector.IRfcStructure]$return = $bapiChangeAsset.GetStructure("RETURN")
           
Write-Host $return.GetValue("MESSAGE")

entry.title: Re: how to process downpayment via contract
entry.content: In 2024, I am still looking for the right config for ECC to make this work, without success, DP posting for Value contract never get recognized in the further Sales order. This scenario thankfully works well in S4...

entry.title: Efficient way to send copy of invoice to the client
entry.content:
Hello

Is there an efficient way to send a copy of an invoice from SAP to a particular contact in S4Hana?

If a customer requests an invoice again, the invoice currently needs to be requested in the system then saved locally and then sent as a pdf via outlook.

Is there a transaction/way of working available to send this more efficiently from SAP as well as with the simple selection of contact person as recipient?

I know it is also possible via the collection worklist but what if it is not in the worklist and the customer requests an invoice again separately from the worklist?

I can hardly imagine that there is no easier way of working than having to save the invoice locally first

Kind regards

ISidore

entry.title: Re: Mass completion of PO Confirmation control order Acknowledgment
entry.content: Hi Raymond, I don't think its possible to do Confirmation Control via Mass Changes to Purchase Orders. Or I don't have the autorization.
